title: [Wizard Guild, Shaft]
description: Vaalorn sconces cast a steady, bluish light over this circular room.  A wide walkway rings a shaft bored clean through the granite of the tower, allowing access to any of the Guild towers at this level.
paths: Obvious exits: northeast, west, up, down

wayto.18043: ;e 40.times { sleep 0.1; break if GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ } }; unless GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ }; disk = Spell[511]; wait_until { disk.affordable? }; disk.cast; end; move 'down'
wayto.18054: ;e 40.times { sleep 0.1; break if GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ } }; unless GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ }; disk = Spell[511]; wait_until { disk.affordable? }; disk.cast; end; move 'up'
